example.py: Qǐng wèn, nǐ guì xìng?
example.en: What's your family name, please?

好.definition: fine, good, nice, OK, it's settled

example.py: nǐ hǎo
example.en: Hello!

请.definition: please (polite form of request), to treat or to invite (somebody)

example.py: Qǐng wèn, nǐ guì xìng?
example.en: What's your family name, please?

example.py: qǐngwèn nǐ guìxìng
example.en: Excuse me, what is your surname?

example.py: Nǐ guì xìng?
example.en: What is your family name? (Lit. Your honorable family name is...?)

姓.definition: (one's) family name is . . . ; family name [See Grammar 1.]

example.py: Wǒ xìng Lǐ.
example.en: My family name is Li.

example.py: wǒ xìng lǐ nǐ ne
example.en: My surname is Li. And you?

example.py: wǒ xìng lǐ nǐ ne
example.en: My surname is Li. And you?

example.cn: 我姓王。李小姐,你叫什么名字？
example.py: wǒ xìng wáng lǐ xiǎojiě nǐ jiào shénme míngzi
example.en: My surname is Wang. Miss Li, what is your name?

叫.definition: to be called, to call [See Grammar 3.]

example.cn: 我姓王。李小姐,你叫什么名字？
example.py: wǒ xìng wáng lǐ xiǎojiě nǐ jiào shénme míngzi
example.en: My surname is Wang. Miss Li, what is your name?

example.py: Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?
example.en: What is your name?

example.py: Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?
example.en: What is your name?

example.cn: 我叫李友。王先生,你叫什么名字？
example.py: wǒ jiào lǐ yǒu wáng xiānsheng nǐ jiào shénme míngzi
example.en: My name is Li You. Mr. Wang, what is your name?

example.cn: 我叫李友。王先生,你叫什么名字？
example.py: wǒ jiào lǐ yǒu wáng xiānsheng nǐ jiào shénme míngzi
example.en: My name is Li You. Mr. Wang, what is your name?

example.py: Wǒ xìng Lǐ.
example.en: My family name is Li.

example.py: Wǒ jiào Wáng Péng.
example.en: My name is Wang Peng.

example.py: Wǒ xìng Wáng.
example.en: My family name is Wang.

example.py: Lǐ Yōu shì xuésheng.
example.en: Li You is a student.

example.py: Nǐ shì lǎoshī ma?
example.en: Are you a teacher?

example.py: Wáng xiānsheng nǐ shì lǎoshī ma
example.en: Mr. Wang, are you a teacher?

example.py: Wǒ bú shì lǎoshī.
example.en: I am not a teacher.

example.py: wǒ shì xuésheng.
example.en: I am a student.

example.py: Wǒ yě shì xuésheng.
example.en: I'm a student, too.

example.cn: 我也是学生。你是中国人吗？
example.py: wǒ yě shì xuésheng nǐ shì Zhōngguó rén ma
example.en: I am a student, too. Are you Chinese?

example.cn: 我也是学生。你是中国人吗？
example.py: wǒ yě shì xuésheng nǐ shì Zhōngguó rén ma
example.en: I am a student, too. Are you Chinese?

example.cn: 是,我是北京人。你是美国人吗？
example.py: shì wǒ shì běi jīng rén nǐ shì měi guó rén ma
example.en: Yes, I am from Beijing. Are you American?

example.py: Nǐ shì Měiguó rén ma?
example.en: Are you American?

example.cn: 你不是纽约人, 我也不是纽约人。
example.py: Nǐ bú shì Niǔyuē rén, wǒ yě bú shì Niǔyuē rén.
example.en: You are not from New York. I am not from New York, either.

example.py: Nà ge nǚ háizi shì Lǐ Yǒu.
example.en: That girl is Li You.

example.py: Zhè shì shéi?
example.en: Who is this?

example.cn: 是。这是我爸爸，这是我妈妈。
example.py: Shì. Zhè shì wǒ bàba, zhè shì wǒ māma.
example.en: Yes. This is my dad, this is my mom.

个.definition: (measure word for many common everyday objects) [See Grammar 2.]

example.py: Zhè ge nǚ háizi shì shéi?
example.en: Who is this girl?

example.py: Gāo Wénzhōng yǒu jiějie.
example.en: Gao Wenzhong has an older sister.

example.py: nà ge nán xuésheng
example.en: that male student

example.py: Wáng xiānsheng yǒu dìdi ma?
example.en: Does Mr. Wang have a younger brother?

有.definition: to have, to exist [See Grammar 4 and Grammar 5.]

example.py: Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén.
example.en: There are five people in my family.

example.py: Bái Yīng'ài nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén
example.en: Bai Ying'ai, how many people are in your family?

口.definition: (measure word for number of family members)

example.py: Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén.
example.en: There are five people in my family.

example.cn: 我家有六口人,我爸爸、我妈妈、一个哥哥、两个妹妹和我。李友,你家有几口人?
example.py: wǒ jiā yǒu liù kǒu rén wǒ bàba wǒ māma yí ge gēge liǎng ge mèimei hé wǒ Lǐ Yǒu nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén
example.en: There are six people in my family: my dad, my mom, an older brother, two younger sisters, and me. Li You, how many people are in your family?

example.py: Xiǎo Gāo jiā yǒu liǎng ge dàxuéshēng.
example.en: There are two college students in Little Gao's family.

example.cn: 王朋和白英爱都有妹妹。
example.py: Wáng Péng hé Bái Yīng'ài dōu yǒu mèimei.
example.en: Both Wang Peng and Bai Ying'ai have younger sisters.

example.cn: 王朋、李友和高文中都是学生。
example.py: Wáng Péng, Lǐ Yǒu hé Gāo Wénzhōng dōu shì xuésheng.
example.en: Wang Peng, Li You, and Gao Wenzhong are all students.

example.cn: 我家有五口人:爸爸、妈妈、大姐、二姐和我。你爸爸妈妈做什么工作?
example.py: wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén bàba māma dàjiě èrjiě hé wǒ nǐ bàba māma zuò shénme gōngzuò
example.en: There are five people in my family: dad, mom, oldest sister, second oldest sister, and me. What do your dad and mom do for work?

example.cn: 我家有五口人:爸爸、妈妈、大姐、二姐和我。你爸爸妈妈做什么工作?
example.py: wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén bàba māma dàjiě èrjiě hé wǒ nǐ bàba māma zuò shénme gōngzuò
example.en: There are five people in my family: dad, mom, oldest sister, second oldest sister, and me. What do your dad and mom do for work?

example.cn: 他/她做什么工作? 你呢?
example.py: Tā zuò shénme gōngzuò? Nǐ ne?
example.en: What does he/she do? How about you?

example.cn: 我家有五口人:爸爸、妈妈、大姐、二姐和我。你爸爸妈妈做什么工作?
example.py: wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén bàba māma dàjiě èrjiě hé wǒ nǐ bàba māma zuò shénme gōngzuò
example.en: There are five people in my family: dad, mom, oldest sister, second oldest sister, and me. What do your dad and mom do for work?

example.cn: 我爸爸是律师,妈妈是英文老师,哥哥、妹妹都是大学生。
example.py: wǒ bàba shì lǜshī māma shì Yīngwén lǎoshī gēge mèimei dōu shì dàxuéshēng
example.en: My dad is a lawyer, and my mom is an English teacher. My older brother and younger sisters are all college students.

example.cn: 我爸爸是律师,妈妈是英文老师,哥哥、妹妹都是大学生。
example.py: wǒ bàba shì lǜshī māma shì Yīngwén lǎoshī gēge mèimei dōu shì dàxuéshēng
example.en: My dad is a lawyer, and my mom is an English teacher. My older brother and younger sisters are all college students.

example.cn: 王朋、李友和高文中都是学生。
example.py: Wáng Péng, Lǐ Yǒu hé Gāo Wénzhōng dōu shì xuésheng.
example.en: Wang Peng, Li You, and Gao Wenzhong are all students.

example.py: Xiǎo Gāo jiā yǒu liǎng ge dàxuéshēng.
example.en: There are two college students in Little Gao's family.

example.cn: 我爸爸是律师,妈妈是英文老师,哥哥、妹妹都是大学生。
example.py: wǒ bàba shì lǜshī māma shì Yīngwén lǎoshī gēge mèimei dōu shì dàxuéshēng
example.en: My dad is a lawyer, and my mom is an English teacher. My older brother and younger sisters are all college students.

example.cn: 我妈妈也是老师,我爸爸是医生。
example.py: wǒ māma yě shì lǎoshī wǒ bàba shì yīshēng
example.en: My mom is also a teacher, and my dad is a doctor.

example.py: Bái Yīng'ài nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén
example.en: Bai Ying'ai, how many people are in your family?
